title: Yar's Revenge
notes: Only works in windowed mode has noticable issues with mouse and some artifacting

Game automatically runs in windowed mode with no option to change it. Issues with the mouse jumping around, but I think that might be an issue with the game. Runs flawlessly with controllers, no artifacting at all throughout the first level.
